channel.title: CyberNetSec - Ransomware
channel.description: Latest ransomware threat intelligence - the last 10 articles

item.title: LogiTrans Global Paralyzed by $45M QuantumLock Ransomware Attack, Global Supply Chains Disrupted
item.description:
Global logistics firm LogiTrans Global has been hit by a devastating ransomware attack attributed to a new group named QuantumLock. The attack, which began on June 30, 2026, has encrypted critical systems, causing a worldwide halt in operations, including shipment tracking and fleet management. The ...

Severity: Critical

Categories: Ransomware, Cyberattack, Supply Chain Attack

Read Full Article →

item.title: One Year Later: Omni Hotels Details $50M Recovery and Security Overhaul After Devastating Ransomware Attack
item.description:
Omni Hotels & Resorts has published a detailed report outlining its recovery and security transformation one year after a catastrophic ransomware attack in 2025. The incident, attributed to the BlackSuit gang, cost the company over $50 million and led to a complete overhaul of its cybersecurity infr...

Severity: Informational

Categories: Incident Response, Security Operations, Ransomware

Read Full Article →

item.title: Ransomware Attacks in Europe Skyrocket by 55% as Supply Chains Become Prime Targets
item.description:
A new report from cyber risk management firm Black Kite reveals a staggering 55.1% year-over-year increase in ransomware attacks across Europe in the first four months of 2026. The manufacturing sector was the most heavily targeted industry. Five countries—Germany, the UK, France, Italy, and Spain—a...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Threat Intelligence, Supply Chain Attack

Read Full Article →

item.title: INC_RANSOM Hits Indian Agro-Tech Firm GSP Crop Science in Ransomware Attack
item.description:
GSP Crop Science Limited, an agricultural technology company based in India, has fallen victim to a ransomware attack by the 'INC_RANSOM' group. The breach, reported on June 26, 2026, threatens a key player in India's agricultural sector. INC_RANSOM is known for its double-extortion tactics, where i...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Data Breach, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →

item.title: New 'Prinz Eugen' Ransomware Written in Go Features Stealthy Extortion Tactics
item.description:
Researchers at CYFIRMA have discovered a new ransomware strain named 'Prinz Eugen,' written in the Go programming language. This modern malware uses the efficient ChaCha20-Poly1305 encryption algorithm and processes files in parallel for maximum speed. A key distinguishing feature is its stealthy ap...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Malware

Read Full Article →

item.title: Healthcare Data Breaches at MN Epilepsy Group, Campbell University, and City of Middletown Expose Patient Info
item.description:
Several U.S. organizations have recently disclosed data breaches affecting sensitive patient information. Minnesota Epilepsy Group reported a breach impacting patients' names, Social Security numbers, and medical data after a network intrusion in March-April 2026. The City of Middletown, NY, notifie...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Ransomware, Regulatory

Read Full Article →

item.title: Stealthy 'Mistic' Backdoor Linked to Ransomware IAB KongTuke in Pre-Attack Campaigns
item.description:
A new and sophisticated Windows backdoor named 'Mistic' (or MLTBackdoor) has been identified in financially motivated attacks since at least April 2026. Researchers from Symantec and Carbon Black have linked the malware with low-to-moderate confidence to KongTuke (aka Woodgnat), a known initial acce...

Severity: High

Categories: Malware, Threat Actor, Ransomware

Read Full Article →

item.title: Indian Automotive Giant Bajaj Auto Hit by Ransomware Attack
item.description:
Indian automotive manufacturer Bajaj Auto has reported a ransomware attack that affected its systems and a wholly-owned subsidiary on June 23, 2026. The company has contained the incident and notified CERT-In, but has not yet disclosed the extent of the damage or whether data was stolen. The attack ...

Severity: High

Categories: Ransomware, Cyberattack, Industrial Control Systems

Read Full Article →

item.title: State Actors Adopting Ransomware Tactics to Mask Espionage, NCC Group Warns
item.description:
A new report from NCC Group warns that the line between nation-state and criminal cyber activity is blurring, with state-backed actors increasingly hiding their espionage operations behind the facade of ransomware attacks. The report highlights a recent campaign by the Iran-linked group MuddyWater, ...

Severity: High

Categories: Threat Actor, Threat Intelligence, Ransomware

Read Full Article →

item.title: DragonForce Ransomware Group Claims Breach of Top Indian University BITS Pilani
item.description:
The DragonForce ransomware group has claimed responsibility for a data breach at the Birla Institute of Technology and Science, Pilani (BITS Pilani), a prominent private university in India. The claim was made on June 23, 2026. Details about the extent of the breach, including the type and volume of...

Severity: High

Categories: Data Breach, Ransomware, Threat Actor

Read Full Article →
